failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the catalog evidence needed to answer the cheapest available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the correct goal and made the expected ProductCatalogSearch call. At step 3, the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with message that the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. The invocation itself was well-formed, and there is no evidence of schema validation, guardrail, or access failure. The failure was not resolved later; the executor simply reported that the task could not be completed.
